title: Longest Path With Different Adjacent Characters
titleCn: 相邻字符不同的最长路径

testcases.input: parent = [-1,0,0,1,1,2], s = "abacbe" Output: 3 Explanation: The longest path where each two adjacent nodes have different characters in the tree is the path: 0 -> 1 -> 3. The length of this path is 3, so 3 is returned. It can be proven that there is no longer path that satisfies the conditions.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The longest path where each two adjacent nodes have different characters in the tree is the path: 0 -> 1 -> 3. The length of this path is 3, so 3 is returned. It can be proven that there is no longer path that satisfies the conditions.

testcases.input: parent = [-1,0,0,0], s = "aabc" Output: 3 Explanation: The longest path where each two adjacent nodes have different characters is the path: 2 -> 0 -> 3. The length of this path is 3, so 3 is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The longest path where each two adjacent nodes have different characters is the path: 2 -> 0 -> 3. The length of this path is 3, so 3 is returned.
